title: Opening for Software Engineer at PharmEasy

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at PharmEasy
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
